channel.title: RBS — Rare Build Software
channel.description: Free Windows software and honest guides — voice cloning, optimization, cleaner, dashboard. By Rai, solo dev, Singapore.

item.title: Windows 11 KB5083769 Update — What's Really Broken, What's Not
item.description: Confirmed VSS backup and BitLocker bugs, the boot-loop rumour that traces back to five forum posts, and the 30-second check to see if you are actually affected.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Claude Opus 4.7 vs GPT-5.4 vs Gemini 3.1 — The April 2026 AI Model Showdown
item.description: Three flagship AI models in eight weeks. Who actually wins which task, plus the open-weights models you can run on your own Windows PC for free.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Microsoft Is Pulling Copilot From Windows Apps — 7 Free Local AI Tools to Use Instead
item.description: Microsoft is rolling Copilot out of Photos, Notepad, Snipping Tool and Widgets in 2026. Here are 7 free local AI tools that run on your PC without sending data anywhere.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Best Open-Source Voice Cloning Models in 2026 — 6 Models Tested on Windows
item.description: Hands-on comparison of F5-TTS, IndexTTS-2, Chatterbox, XTTS v2, Fish Speech V1.5 and CosyVoice 2 on a regular RTX 3060. Which model wins for what.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: ElevenLabs Pricing 2026 ($990/mo Business) — 5 Free Local Voice Cloners That Match the Quality
item.description: Real ElevenLabs pricing in 2026 plus 5 free local alternatives that run on Windows without metering your characters.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Is AI Voice Cloning Legal in 2026? A Plain-English Guide for Creators
item.description: Plain-English breakdown of the ELVIS Act, California AB853, the federal Voice Cloning Protection Act, and the EU AI Act. What creators, podcasters and devs actually need to know.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Free ElevenLabs Alternative — 4 Free Voice Cloning Tools (2026)
item.description: Tested 4 free, offline AI voice cloning tools for Windows in 2026. Unlimited generation, no monthly cap, no cloud — proper alternatives to ElevenLabs paid plans.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: How to Clone Your Voice in 5 Minutes — Free, Offline, Windows
item.description: Step-by-step beginner walkthrough: install, record a 30-second sample, save the profile, generate any text in your own voice. No Python, no subscription, all offline.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Best Free Habit Tracker for Windows Desktop (Offline, No Subscription) — 2026
item.description: Most habit trackers are phone apps or cloud-bound web tools. Here is a free Windows desktop habit tracker that works fully offline — plus 15 more widgets in one window.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: RBS Voice Cloner V2 — Major Update with 16 Voices & 7-Band EQ
item.description: The biggest Voice Cloner update yet. 16 built-in voices, 7-band parametric EQ tuned for voice, in-app translator across 17 languages, redesigned audio editor, and CUDA 12.8 runtime. New EQ-bar logo. Free.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: RBS Voice Cloner V1 vs V2 — Which Should You Download?
item.description: Side-by-side comparison: V1 (~248 MB, lighter) vs V2 (~2 GB, much better). Pick the right version for your PC and use case.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: 7-Band Parametric EQ for Voice — Which Preset to Pick
item.description: What each EQ band does (60 Hz Sub through 12 kHz Air), when to use Natural / Warm / Bright / Podcast / Phone / Flat presets, and how to fix common voice problems with EQ.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Free BleachBit Alternative for Windows 11 (2026)
item.description: BleachBit is powerful but intimidating. Here is a friendlier free alternative that keeps the privacy-first / no-telemetry stance.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: How to Remove MSI Bloatware from Windows 11 (2026 Guide)
item.description: MSI Center vs Dragon Center, Mystic Light, MSI App Player — what to keep, what to nuke. Specifics for Stealth, Vector, Raider, Cyborg.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: RBS Voice Cloner vs Murf AI vs Speechify (2026)
item.description: Free local voice cloner against two of the biggest paid TTS services. Honest pricing, quality and use-case comparison for 2026.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: RBS PC Cleaner v1.0.0 — Free Honest Windows Cleaner (No Registry)
item.description: RBS PC Cleaner is out — safe junk cleaner, duplicate finder, bulk uninstaller, startup manager, gaming mode, and 9 theme packs. 100% free, reversible, never scans the registry.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: How to Clean Windows 11 Without Breaking It — Safe Guide
item.description: Which junk is safe to remove, which to leave alone, and a free tool that rates every cleanup action before you run it. Step-by-step guide for Windows 10/11.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Free Browser Cache Cleaner — Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Brave, Opera
item.description: Clear cache, cookies, and history across all five major browsers in one click. Saved passwords are reported but never deleted. Free for Windows 10/11.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: How to Find and Delete Duplicate Files on Windows (Free, Safe)
item.description: Hash-based duplicate file finder that always keeps the oldest file and auto-skips system folders. Reclaim gigabytes from Downloads, Photos, and Videos safely.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Best Free Startup Manager for Windows 11 (2026)
item.description: Safely disable Windows 11 startup entries and cut boot time by 40–70%. Fully reversible — disabled entries are parked in a sibling key, not deleted.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Uninstall Multiple Programs at Once on Windows — Free Bulk Uninstaller
item.description: Tick multiple programs and uninstall in sequence. Silent mode auto-detected. Sort by size to find the biggest targets. Free for Windows 10/11.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Customize Windows 11 Icons & Themes — 9 Free Theme Packs
item.description: 9 ready-made Windows 11 theme packs with matching icons and 2560×1440 wallpapers. Apply in one click — Restore Original reverts exactly.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Gaming Mode for Windows — Boost FPS Without Shady "Game Boosters"
item.description: One click: safe clean + memory trim + High Performance power plan + suspend background apps. Resume button undoes everything. 100% free.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Clear Discord, Teams, Spotify & VS Code Cache on Windows
item.description: One click to clear cache for Discord, Microsoft Teams, Spotify, VS Code, Slack and Zoom. Reclaim 5–15 GB of Electron app cache safely.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Free Disk Space Analyzer for Windows — See What's Using Your Space
item.description: Read-only folder tree with drill-down. Find the gigabytes Windows Storage settings won't show you. No admin required, no cloud upload.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Life Dashboard vs Notion vs Obsidian (2026) — Honest Comparison
item.description: Three very different tools for personal productivity. What each is genuinely good at, what each is bad at, and which to pick.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: How to Remove Lenovo Bloatware from Windows 11 (2026 Guide)
item.description: Vantage, Now, Welcome, McAfee — what to keep, what to nuke. Specifics for ThinkPad, IdeaPad, Yoga, Legion, ThinkBook.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Life Dashboard v1.0.0 — Your All-in-One Productivity App
item.description: Track your habits, finances, sleep, diet, tasks, and goals all in one beautiful dashboard. 16 customisable widgets, drag-and-drop layout, all data stored locally. Free forever.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: RBS Voice Cloner v1.0.0 — Free AI Voice Cloning for Windows
item.description: Clone any voice in seconds with just a 5-second audio sample. RBS Voice Cloner uses the XTTS v2 AI engine to generate natural speech in 28+ languages — completely free and runs offline.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: How to Remove Acer Bloatware from Windows 11 (2026 Guide)
item.description: Acer Care Center, NitroSense, Quick Access, Norton trial — what to keep, what to remove. Specifics for Aspire, Swift, Nitro, Predator.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Windows 11 Running Slow? 12 Ways to Fix It (Free)
item.description: Windows 11 running slow on your PC? 12 step-by-step free fixes — from quick wins to deep optimizations. No reinstall, no paid software needed.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: How to Remove Asus Bloatware from Windows 11 (2026 Guide)
item.description: Armoury Crate, MyAsus, GameFirst — what to keep, what to nuke. Specifics for ROG, TUF, ZenBook, VivoBook, ProArt.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: Free Stardock IconPackager Alternative for Windows 11 (2026)
item.description: Stardock IconPackager is $30. Here is how to get most of the same look on Windows 11 for free, without patching system files.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: How to Remove Dell Bloatware from Windows 11
item.description: Step-by-step guide to uninstalling Dell pre-installed apps on Windows 11 — speed up your Dell laptop and reclaim RAM and storage for free.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: RBS PC Cleaner vs CCleaner (2026) — Honest Comparison
item.description: Side-by-side: free tier features, ads, telemetry, registry cleaner, and which one to pick. Written by the developer of one of them.
item.author: noreply@rarebuildsoftware.com (Rai)

item.title: How to Free Up RAM on Windows 11 — Complete Guide (2026)
item.description: Is your Windows 11 PC running slow with high RAM usage? 10 proven free methods to free up RAM — from closing background apps to one-click optimization.

item.title: Best Free PC Optimization Tools 2026
item.description: We compare the top free Windows optimization tools available today. Find out which ones actually work and which to avoid.

item.title: How to Remove HP Bloatware from Windows 11 (2026 Guide)

item.title: How to Speed Up Windows 11 in 2026
